codeReview.summary: Pass. Reviewing the original gated-export commit `361ac94` together with the follow-up fix `38bf141` shows that the prior blocking regression is addressed: hosted-provider constants and generated provider symbol sets in `agents-extensions::sandbox` are now reintroduced behind per-provider `#[cfg(feature = ...)]` guards, while the updated temp-crate semantics tests cover both successful imports with the matching feature enabled and failed imports with the feature absent from the facade and extensions namespaces.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed scrutiny report, the mission feature records, the fix feature handoff and transcript skeleton, the shared-state guidance (`AGENTS.md`, `.factory/services.yaml`, `.factory/library/*`), and both relevant diffs (`361ac94` and `38bf141`). The follow-up fix adequately resolves the original blocking export-gating failure and I did not find any new code-review or shared-state issues, so I recorded this feature review as a pass.
